text:
Neon Genesis Evangelion Addition is the fourth music album released relating to the Neon Genesis Evangelion franchise. The album was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICA-334 (limited edition KICA-334), it was released on 21 December 1996. http://vgmdb.net/album/23736 

The limited edition album was released to include a movie ticket for the first Evangelion film, Evangelion: Death and Rebirth, which was released on 15 March 1997. http://vgmdb.net/album/28599 http://vgmdb.net/album/19799 The album cover features an illustration by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto. It features three instrumental, five vocal, and four drama tracks.

"Addition" features the seiyu for Rei Ayanami (Megumi Hayashibara), Asuka Langley Sohryu (Yuko Miyamura) and Misato Katsuragi (Kotono Mitsuishi), who between them account for seven of the twelve tracks. The classical pieces of music in the album are "Chorus: Hallelujah Chorus", "Chorus: Worthy is the Lamb...Amen " are by George Frideric Handel and "4th Mov: Presto" (Symphony No. 9 in D minor Op. 125 "Choral") ("Ode to Joy") is by Ludwig van Beethoven and conducted by .
